basic_details.job_title: NIT Meghalaya Guest Faculty Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online Posts
basic_details.short_information: The latest National Institute of Technology Meghalaya (NIT Meghalaya) Recruitment 2026 has been announced for Guest Faculty posts. Published under Advt No. NITMGH/ES/B.Sc-B.Ed/2026-27/203 on 06 May 2026 at the official website NIT Meghalaya Official Website, this new recruitment drive offers 4 openings for eligible candidates. Applicants possessing Postgraduate Degree, M.Ed, Ph.D/NET/SET qualifications in relevant disciplines can apply through email mode till 20 May 2026. Find all details about the NIT Meghalaya Guest Faculty new vacancy 2026, including eligibility, application process, and no

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: Postgraduate degree with minimum 55% marks, M.Ed. with minimum 55% marks, Ph.D./NET/SET
qualification.details: Associate Professor (Foundations of Education): (i) Postgraduate degree in Sciences or Mathematics or Social Sciences or Commerce or Languages with minimum 55% marks or equivalent grade. (ii) M.Ed. with minimum 55% marks or equivalent grade. (iii) Ph.D. in Education. (iv) Ten years of teaching experience in a Teacher Education Institution. (v) Any other relevant qualifications prescribed by the University Grants Commission from time to time. Desirable: Diploma or Degree in Educational Administration or Leadership. Assistant Professor (Foundations of Education): (i) Postgraduate degree in relevant subject with minimum 55% marks or equivalent grade. (ii) M.Ed. with minimum 55% marks or equivalent grade. (iii) National Eligibility Test or State Level Eligibility Test or Doctor of Philosophy in Education or any other qualifications prescribed by University Grants Commission. Desirable: Ph.D. in Education Assistant Professor (Art Education): (i) Postgraduate degree in Performing or Visual Arts with minimum 55% marks or its equivalent grade. (ii) National Eligibility Test or State Level Eligibility Test or Doctor of Philosophy in Arts or any other qualifications prescribed by University Grants Commission. (iii) M.A. in Education with specialization in Art Education.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for NIT Meghalaya Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 20-05-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for NIT Meghalaya Guest Faculty posts?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the NIT Meghalaya Guest Faculty recruitment is 20-05-2026. Ensure your application reaches before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Guest Faculty position at NIT Meghalaya?
faq.answer: There are a total of 4 vacancies announced for the Guest Faculty positions at NIT Meghalaya in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for NIT Meghalaya Guest Faculty recruitment?
faq.answer: The application for the Guest Faculty positions at NIT Meghalaya must be submitted via email. Make sure to follow the prescribed format and send it to the official email address.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Guest Faculty positions?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Guest Faculty positions at NIT Meghalaya will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 65,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q5. What are the minimum educational qualifications required for the Guest Faculty posts?
faq.answer: Candidates need a Postgraduate degree with a minimum of 55% marks, an M.Ed. with a minimum of 55% marks, and Ph.D./NET/SET to be eligible for these posts.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for NIT Meghalaya Guest Faculty recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the Guest Faculty recruitment at NIT Meghalaya.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Guest Faculty posts at NIT Meghalaya?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Guest Faculty positions at NIT Meghalaya involves the scrutiny of applications followed by an interview of the shortlisted candidates.

faq.question: Q8. Which departments are recruiting Guest Faculty at NIT Meghalaya?
faq.answer: NIT Meghalaya is recruiting Guest Faculty for the Foundations of Education and Art Education departments, with specific roles like Associate Professor and Assistant Professor.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for the Guest Faculty positions at NIT Meghalaya?
faq.answer: The Guest Faculty positions at NIT Meghalaya are contractual in nature, offering a fixed-term engagement for the specified period.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for NIT Meghalaya Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official notification for NIT Meghalaya Recruitment 2026 can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section on this page, under the 'Official Notification PDF' link.
